title: Team Project Progress Report Due
detail: Download PPT template from Brightspace Week 10. Submit 1 per team by beginning of class on Wednesday.

title: Midterm Exam 2 (Chapters 5, 6, 8)
detail: In-person during lecture (3:40-5:20 PM). Covers Chapters 5, 6, 8. Worth 250 points (25% of total grade).

title: Part 3: Brand Development Presentation (Practice)
detail: In-class practice presentation on Thursday. Pass/fail grade with feedback.

title: Republic Position Paper Due
detail: Pick ONE aspect of Plato's Republic to describe and critique. 5+ pages, double-spaced. First third descriptive, remainder argumentative. Must interact with opposing viewpoint. No bibliography required — use textual citations from the Republic. Late papers will NOT be accepted. Worth 20% of final grade.

title: Individual Oral Practice (Pitch Vantage)
detail: Submit individual 2-3 minute pitch. Worth 5% of total grade.

title: 12 Angry Men Movie Questions Due
detail: Watch '12 Angry Men' during Week 11 (holiday week). Submit answers via email by beginning of class for participation credit.

title: HW7 — Chapter 10 (Connect)
detail: Complete on McGraw-Hill Connect by 11:59 PM PST.

title: Full/Final App Project Presentations
detail: 10-minute combined final presentation in class. Must include app screenshots and video content. Email slides to professor AND upload to Brightspace.

title: HW8 & HW9 — Chapters 11 & 12 (Connect)
detail: Complete on McGraw-Hill Connect by 11:59 PM PST.

title: HW10 — Chapter 13 (Connect)
detail: Complete on McGraw-Hill Connect by 11:59 PM PST.

title: Kohl's Business Data Exercise
detail: Written exercise due in class.

title: Team Presentations (3 teams)
detail: 20-25 minute in-class presentations on Monday. Remaining 3 teams present Wednesday April 29.

title: CBA Showcase Poster Event
detail: Setup 5:30-5:45 PM, event 5:45-6:00 PM. At least 1 team member should attend. CBA Advantage Points for presenting.

title: Follow-up Email to Client Organization
detail: Thank-you email with brief summary of findings. CC Professor Schlaerth. Required to receive a grade. Due by midnight.

title: HW11 — Chapter 14 (Connect)
detail: Complete on McGraw-Hill Connect by 11:59 PM PST.

title: Peerceptiv Peer Evaluation
detail: No submission = ZERO points (0/20). Due by 11:59 PM.

title: Exam 2 — In-Person Case Study Analysis
detail: In-person during class. Business case study analysis using Green Exam Book. NOT open book/open notes. 6 sections, 10 pts each = 60 pts. Will NOT be rescheduled.

title: Final Exam (Chapters 10-14)
detail: In-person. Worth 250 points (25%). Check your section for exact time slot.

title: Connect E-book Homework — All Modules Due
detail: Final deadline for all Connect textbook modules. No extensions. Due by 11:59 PM.

title: Mentor Final Report and Evaluation
detail: Professional compilation of all Q&A, meeting summaries, dated evidence of all interactions, plus 6 reflection questions. Submit on Brightspace by 11:59 PM. No extensions.

title: Final Exam (Weeks 9-14)
detail: In-class at 11:00 AM, St. Roberts Hall Rm 239. Covers Weeks 9-14 content. Worth 30% of grade.

title: Reminder: Quizzes Nearly Every Class
detail: Quizzes are given nearly every class period, based on the reading due that day plus previous discussion. No make-ups for tardy/absent students. Two lowest scores dropped. Worth 60% of final grade.

title: No Classes — Cesar Chavez Day & Easter
detail: March 31 (Tue) is Cesar Chavez Day — no classes. April 2 (Thu) is Easter Holiday — no classes.
